title: Magex's Barrel TNT
description: This resource pack changes the TNT into a more realistic barrel texture
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d45d2a144b3c0230ad1a321db0bb5aaf0ddf37e9.png)

# About
Magex's Barrel TNT is a resource pack, that changes the TNT block texture and model into a more-realistic, medieval inspired barrel full of TNT!


# Features
- Changes the texture of TNT
- Changes the model of TNT
